texto: Let us not make a procrustean bed of trans issues and force deities of the past onto it, let us instead awaken trans and other gender-variant deities from their own beds! There is no possibility of blasphemy against existing powers and their human followers if the deities in question are our own, and we never have to "take them back," because they have always been ours to begin with!
explicacao: Orientação direta de P. Sufenas Virius Lupus sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Let us not make a procrustean bed of trans issues and force deities of the past onto it, let us i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, blasphemy, deities, útil em momentos de termino e deities.
